hooks.description: System integrity check + workspace detection + structured output for model greeting
Injection pattern detection (stderr) + workspace signal emission (stdout)
Deterministic persona auto-calibration + prompt-optimizer signals (stdout additionalContext)
Block dangerous commands (rm -rf, git reset --hard, .env access) before execution
Enforce artifact placement: task outputs must land in workspace/{active}/; kit internals maintainer-gated; ad-hoc writes blocked and routed
Auto-log tool usage to active workspace tasklog via workspace-manager.sh
Mark session boundary in workspace tasklog + update timestamps
